data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On Wednesday As Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire?
data.description: On Tuesday, the S&P 500 experienced a 0.63% decline, closing at 7,064.01, amidst concerns regarding the potential of a U.S.-Iran peace deal before the ceasefire deadline. Conversely, Polymarket, based on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), is showing strong optimism for Wednesday, with approximately 89% of traders expecting an upward trend. The market activity on April 22 indicates significant bullish sentiment, particularly on the direction of the S&P 500's opening. The drop in stock values during Tuesday's session was attributed to escalating uncertainty surrounding the ceasefire's stability. However, sentiments improved post-market close, with President Donald Trump conveying that the U.S. would...

data.title: Sandvik - Interim report first quarter 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Stockholm, a company reported an order intake of SEK 36,756 million, which marks a significant increase from the previous period's SEK 32,763 million. The order intake showed a 23% growth at fixed exchange rates and organically. Revenues also saw a rise to SEK 30,685 million from SEK 29,301 million, with revenue growth of 15% at fixed exchange rates and organically as well.

data.title: Superdrug Names Hanshow as Digital Shelf Partner, Driving the Next Phase of Health & Beauty Retail Digitalisation
data.description: In London on April 22, 2026, Hanshow, a prominent provider of digital retail solutions worldwide, announced it had been chosen by Superdrug, a top health and beauty retailer in the UK and a part of the A.S. Watson Group. This partnership signifies Hanshow's role as the digital shelf provider for Superdrug's ongoing digital evolution.

data.title: Vertiv Reports Strong First Quarter with Diluted EPS Growth of 136% (Adjusted Diluted EPS Growth of +83%); Raises Full-Year Guidance
data.description: In the initial quarter of 2026, the company reported impressive financial results with net sales reaching $2,650 million, marking a substantial 30% increase compared to the same period in 2025. Operating profit also saw a significant surge, rising by 51%, while the adjusted operating profit soared by 64% from the first quarter of the previous year. The adjusted operating margin stood at 20.8%, showing a noteworthy improvement of 430 basis points over the first quarter of 2025. In addition, the operating cash flow for the period exhibited positive performance...

data.title: Hengrui Pharma Reports Q1 2026 Results with Revenue and Net Profit Growth
data.description: In the initial quarter of 2026, Hengrui Pharma in Shanghai experienced consistent advancement. The company achieved a revenue of RMB 8.14 billion during this period, marking a 12.98% year-on-year increase. Additionally, the net profit attributable to shareholders surged by 21.78% to reach RMB 2.28 billion.

data.title: TREMBLANT UNVEILS ITS SUMMER PROGRAM
data.description: In Mont-Tremblant, Quebec, a summer festival highlighting the beauty of the outdoors, music, and nature is set to captivate visitors. Bloomafest Tremblant will take place on May 8 and 9, offering a dynamic two-day program to commemorate the spring season. Guests can expect a celebration filled with music, outdoor activities, and appreciation for nature. This event promises to showcase the essence of Tremblant's charm, attracting a large number of attendees eager to partake in the festivities.
